properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, make me an instrument of Your peace Where there's hatred, let me sow love And where there is injury, pardon And where there is doubt, then faith And where there's despair, then hope

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's in dying that I will be born And in giving that I will receive It's in loving that I will be loved This is my faith, it is what I believe Lord, make me an instrument Make me an instrument

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, I am a stranger traveling In a brutal yet wondrous land Far from the promise of home On a journey led by Your hand To where the lion lies down with the lamb

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Father, grant that I'd never seek To be comforted as to console Let the blood of Your Son cover me Touching my spirit Seizing my soul

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord, make me an instrument Lord, make me an instrument Lord make me your instrument

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let Your divine mystery guide my heart It's in dying that I will be born And in giving that I will receive It's in loving that I will be loved This is my faith, it is what I believe

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Christ within me Christ before me Christ behind me Christ above me Christ beneath me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: To my left and my right Christ where I lie and where I arise Christ in the hearts of all who think of me Christ on the lips of all who speak of me Christ in the eyes of all who see me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Make me Your instrument, Lord Make me Your instrument, Lord Make me Your instrument, Lord Make me Your instrument, Lord Make me Your instrument
